ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "part_no" TEXT /* Part number of the component */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the component */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the component (e.g., resistors, capacitors) */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity available in stock */,
  "digikey_part_no" TEXT /* Digi-Key part number for sourcing */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the component */,
  "substitute_type" TEXT /* Type of substitute available for the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component involved in the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., addition, subtraction) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity affected in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_transactions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_transactions_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_substitutes" (
  "substitute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substitute entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component for which this is a substitute */,
  "substitute_part_no" TEXT /* Part number of the substitute component */,
  "substitute_manufacturer" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer of the substitute component */,
  "substitute_digikey_part_no" TEXT /* Digi-Key part number of the substitute component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substitute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_substitutes_substitute_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("substitute_manufacturer") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_substitutes_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total storage capacity of the warehouse */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouse_inventory" (
  "warehouse_inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse inventory entry */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component in this warehouse */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity to trigger a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the threshold is reached */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouse_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouse_inventory_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_prices" (
  "price_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price history record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the component */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for pricing */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when this price became effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_prices_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_prices_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being ordered */,
  "order_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date of shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component affected */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction associated with the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., add, remove, update) */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES inventory_transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, inventory manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse managed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission granted (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)
